name: Moist Chocolate Cake with Coffee
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------FAVORITE ICING-------------------------------
1 cup Milk
5 tablespoons All-purpose flour
1/2 cup Butter, softened
1/2 cup Shortening
1 cup Sugar
1 teaspoon Vanilla extract
Sift together dry ingredients in a mixing bowl. Add oil, coffee, and milk; mix at medium speed for 2 minutes. Add eggs and vanilla; beat 2 more minutes. (Batter will be thin.)
Pour into 2 greased and floured 9-inch cake pans. Bake at 325°F for 25-30 minutes. Cool cakes 15 minutes before removing from pans. Cool on wire racks. Meanwhile, for icing, combine milk and flour in a saucepan; cook until thick. Cover and refrigerate. In a mixing bowl, beat butter, shortening, sugar, and vanilla until creamy. Add chilled milk/flour mixture and beat for 10 minutes. Frost cooled cake.
